Design By S9 Consulting

Samba Azul

Short Description

Max 6 Guests
2 Bedrooms
2 Baths
Pool
Internet
Chocolate Hole

Description

2 primary en-suite Bedrooms Each with Private Deck for Morning Coffee Or Sunset Villa features a large open Cooks kitchen and great room which opens onto the covered outdoor dining deck. Great room features large flat screen TV with HD Cable, Surround Sound Stereo. Large Sofas provide comfortable seating for 6. There is a game table-which serves as indoor dining if weather does not allow outdoor eating (rare but possible) and a comfy reading chair rounds out the room. Kitchen has everything any cook could require. Large counter surfaces, all in unique Brazilian Granite. The 13-foot-long bar counter divides the kitchen from the great room. There is a powder room off the great room which features a unique amethyst (stones not just color) vessel.


There are 2 primary bedrooms. Each has its own huge bathroom with both shower and whirlpool tub. Lavatories have 2 sinks, and the Brazilian granite countertops. One bedroom has a king bed, the other has twin beds which can be configured as a king. Each bedroom has sliding glass doors lead to the private decks which look out to the pool deck. The bedrooms are separated by the kitchen and great room, they sit on either end of the villa for maximum privacy.


Base nightly rates vary and additional per person per night charges and other fees may apply.


To view more information, photos and reviews please visit VRBO at:

Convenient location and beautiful sunsets (vrbo.com)


To book direct, please contact James M. Miller Property Management at:

miller.marc17@yahoo.com

Reviews

This house was better than advertised. It was much bigger and cleaner than we thought. The area it is in is beautiful. We rented a jeep for the week and had no problem getting around. I loved samba azul and would love to visit again. The check in was simple. And the place house had everything we could have ever needed. It is one of my favorite places!! - Adam H.


We stayed here in April 2025. The house was just as pictured. One of the cleanest properties I have ever stayed in. We rented a car and had no problems getting around. JP met us at the house and gave us advice on restaurants and snorkeling. We are a family of 4 and they were able to split the one king into two twins. It was the perfect set up for us. The best snorkeling and tons of wildlife. We will definitely be back. - Laura V.
